data.body: Done definition update (2026-04-26 scope expansion, epic 3aaa-0238 SC8/SC9/SC10): Required-check list expands from 4 (lint, format, tests, LLM review) to 11 by adding: validate-ci (from d025-87d4), three platform-matrix legs linux-bash4/macos-bash3/alpine-busybox (from new story 792b-eb80), and pipefail-strict (from new story 4383-9234). Coordinate check-context naming with each upstream story.
